Based on the search results, here's what I found about Claude Code CLI updates in 2026:

## Latest Version

Claude Code 2.1.0 has been released as of January 8, 2026. Version 2.1.0 shipped on January 7, 2026, with 2.1.9 following immediately with 109 CLI refinements.

## Key Features in Claude Code 2.1.0

The team shipped 1,096 commits in this release — covering everything from terminal input improvements to a complete overhaul of how skills work.

Notable improvements include:

- Shift+Enter working out of the box in iTerm2, Kitty, Ghostty, and WezTerm without modifying terminal configs
- Hot reload for skills, so new or updated skills in ~/.claude/skills or .claude/skills become available immediately without restarting sessions
- Language-specific output via a language setting, enabling workflows that require output in Japanese, Spanish, or other languages
- Added clickable hyperlinks for file paths in tool output in terminals that support OSC 8 (like iTerm), added support for Windows Package Manager (winget) installations, and fixed a command injection vulnerability in bash command processing

## How to Update

To update, run: `claude update` and check your version with: `claude --version`


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.text:
## How to Update Claude Code

Updating Claude Code is simple:

**Run the following command:**
```bash
claude update
```

This will automatically download and install the latest version of Claude Code.

**Verify the update:**
```bash
claude --version
```

This command will show you the currently installed version.

## Latest Version Information

As of January 2026, Claude Code 2.1.0 is the latest available version, featuring:
- Shift+Enter support for newlines in most terminals (iTerm2, Kitty, Ghostty, WezTerm) without configuration
- Hot reload for skills - new or updated skills in `~/.claude/skills` or `.claude/skills` become available immediately
- Language-specific output configuration (Japanese, Spanish, etc.)
- Improved terminal support with clickable hyperlinks for file paths
- Support for Windows Package Manager (winget) installations
- Various security and performance improvements

The update is straightforward and should only take a moment to complete.

Sources:
- [Claude Code Releases on GitHub](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/releases)
- [Claude Code Changelog](https://claudelog.com/claude-code-changelog/)
- [Claude Code Setup Docs](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/setup)
